7:["$","article",null,{"className":"prose prose-zinc max-w-none","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8 not-prose","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-2","children":"AI Quantitative Trading: From Models to Quant Funds"}],["$","time",null,{"className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground","children":"April 29, 2025"}]]}],[["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"This post explores how modern quant funds use machine learning for trading, from feature engineering to model deployment."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"The Quant ML Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"1. Data Engineering"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Raw market data is messy. The first step is cleaning and normalizing:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Price normalization"}],": Adjusting for splits, dividends, corporate actions"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Time alignment"}],": Synchronizing data from multiple sources"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Outlier detection"}],": Identifying and handling bad ticks"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"2. 18:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"4. Training Consideration"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Purging and embargo"}],": Prevent information leakage by removing overlapping periods"]}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Walk-forward analysis"}],": Train on past, validate on recent, test on future"]}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Regime detection"}],": Markets change. Models should adapt or be specialized for different regimes."]}]
1c:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"5. Risk Management"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Machine learning models can find spurious correlations:"}]
1e:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Position sizing"}],": Kelly criterion or mean-variance optimization"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Stop losses"}],": Hard and trailing stops"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Drawdown controls"}],": Reduce exposure during losing streaks"]}],"\n"]}]
1f:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"From Prediction to Portfolio"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"A trading system needs more than return forecasts:"}]
21:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Alpha model"}],": Predict expected returns"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Risk model"}],": Estimate covariance matrix"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transaction cost model"}],": Estimate market impact"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Portfolio construction"}],": Optimize weights given constraints"]}],"\n"]}]
22:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The optimizer balances expected return against risk and costs:"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":["$","span",null,{"className":"katex","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"katex-mathml","children":["$","math",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML","children":["$","semantics",null,{"children":[["$","mrow",null,{"children":[["$","msub",null,{"children":[["$","mrow",null,{"children":[["$","mi",null,{"children":"max"}],["$","mo",null,{"children":"⁡"}]]}],["$","mi",null,{"children":"w"}]]}],["$","mrow",null,{"children":[["$","mo",null,{"fence":"true","children":"("}],["$","msup",null,{"children":[["$","mi",null,{"children":"α"}],["$","mi",null,{"children":"T"}]]}],["$","mi",null,{"children":"w"}],["$","mo",null,{"children":"−"}],["$","mi",null,{"children":"λ"}],["$","msup",null,{"children":[["$","mi",null,{"children":"w"}],["$","mi",null,{"children":"T"}]]}],["$","mi",null,{"mathvariant":"normal","children":"Σ"}],["$","mi",null,{"children":"w"}],["$","mo",null,{"children":"−"}],["$","mtext",null,{"children":"TC"}],["$","mo",null,{"stretchy":"false","children":"("}],["$","mi",null,{"children":"w"}],["$","mo",null,{"stretchy":"false","children":")"}],["$","mo",null,{"fence":"true","children":")"}]]}]]}],["$","annotation",null,{"encoding":"application/x-tex","children":"\\max_{w} \\left( \\alpha^T w - \\lambda w^T \\Sigma w - \\text{TC}(w) \\right)"}]]}]}]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"katex-html","aria-hidden":"true","children":["$","span",null,{"className":"base","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"strut","style":{"height":"1.2em","verticalAlign":"-0.35em"}}],["$","span",null,{"className":"mop","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"mop","children":"max"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"msupsub","children":["$","span",null,{"className":"vlist-t 2a:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Market Efficiency"}]

2e:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Predictions are worthless without execution:"}]

30:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Conclusion"}]
31:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Quantitative trading with ML is hard. The easy alpha has been arbitraged away. Success requires:"}]

33:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The firms that combine these elements will continue to generate alpha. The rest will become case studies in the difficulty of trading."}]
